title: Remark plugin for converting diagram and design embeds to image nodes
purpose: Processes markdown trees to transform {{diagram:id}} and {{design:id}} syntax into image nodes with specific URLs for rendering.
module_context: Exports a remark plugin function that modifies AST nodes to convert custom embed syntax into standard image nodes.

steps.content: Return a function that accepts a markdown AST tree.
Define an inner visitor function that recursively processes tree nodes.
For each node with children, examine text content for matching embed patterns.
Split text content on embed patterns and convert matches into image nodes.
Preserve non-matching text parts as text nodes in the output.
Process each child node of the current node.
For text nodes containing embed patterns, split and convert them into image nodes.
For non-text nodes, recursively visit their children.
Replace original children with processed children including converted image nodes.
